collectProtocolFees(address).notice: Transfer all protocol fees to `dest` and zero the ledger.

init(IPartyPoolDeployer.DeployParams).notice: Constructor body for PartyPool, factored into this library so the pool's creation         code stays under EIP-170. Runs once via delegatecall during PartyPool's constructor         and writes only to storage; immutables are assigned inline by the constructor itself         (Solidity requires immutables be syntactically inside the constructor and they         aren't readable across delegatecall during construction).
